subtext: Answers to the questions we hear most often about our wedding childcare service.

items.question: How far in advance should I book the service?
items.answer: We recommend booking three to six months before the wedding, especially during peak season (May to October). This lets us match the number of caregivers to your final guest list.

items.question: How many caregivers do we need for our guests?
items.answer: It depends on the children's ages: for infants and children under 2 we recommend one caregiver per 3-4 children, and for children aged 6 to 10, one per 8-10. We adjust the team based on your confirmed guest list.

items.question: What happens if a child gets sick or hurt?
items.answer: Our team carries a first-aid kit and follows clear protocols for contacting parents or, if needed, medical services. Before the event we collect contact details and any relevant allergies.

items.question: Which areas do you work in?
items.answer: We provide childcare services in Barcelona and throughout Catalonia. If your wedding is elsewhere, get in touch and we'll confirm availability.

items.question: What training does the caregiving team have?
items.answer: All our caregivers hold pediatric first-aid training, demonstrable group-care experience, and a current certificate confirming no record of sexual offenses.

items.question: Does the service include activities and materials?
items.answer: Yes, we plan and provide activity materials (crafts, games, sensory kits) matched to the confirmed ages, so you don't need to bring anything extra.
